name: COLOR
description: Solid paint color (straight RGBA, 0..1). Default opaque black.

name: FILL_RULE
description: Fill rule for FILL (fill_rule enum: 0 = nonZero winding, 1 = evenOdd; #726). Default nonZero. evenOdd leaves a hole where an odd number of contours overlap.

name: STROKE_WIDTH
description: Stroke width in logical px for STROKE (#727). Default 1.

name: CAP
description: Stroke line cap (line_cap enum: 0 = butt, 1 = round, 2 = square; #727). Default butt.

name: JOIN
description: Stroke line join (line_join enum: 0 = miter, 1 = round, 2 = bevel; #727). Default miter.

name: MITER_LIMIT
description: Miter limit for miter joins (#727). Default 4.

name: DASH
description: Stroke dash pattern (#727): a count-prefixed list of on/off interval lengths in logical px. Empty = solid. Encoded as [DASH, count, i0, i1, …]; pair with DASH_OFFSET for the starting phase.

name: DASH_OFFSET
description: Starting phase offset into the dash pattern in logical px (#727). Default 0.
